## Diagram task

What kind of diagram were you trying to make?

## What worked

What part of the skill or example was useful?

## What was confusing

Where did the workflow slow down or fail?

## Source boundary

No private diagrams, screenshots, local paths, emails, or copied paper figures
should be pasted here. Describe the structure with synthetic labels if needed.
